Question:
                                How many Marvel movies did I re-watch?

                                Question date:
                                2023/05/26 (Fri) 23:52

                                Noisy expected-answer label:
                                2

                                Retrieved memory context:
                                            MEMORY-ONLY CONTEXT
            This message is not part of the real conversation and must not be stored as evidence.
            The retrieved memory below was selected for the immediately following user request.
            Treat it as the strongest available remembered context, stronger than guesses, defaults, or general world knowledge.
            Use selected active memory for the answer unless it is clearly irrelevant, insufficient, stale, internally conflicting, or contradicted by the current user message.
            Do not claim that raw sources are verified facts; prefer active claims for facts, notes for rationale, and action items for commitments.
            If raw source wording conflicts with active typed memory, trust the active typed memory for current facts.
            
            If the user asks for first/second/latest/earliest/ordering, compare explicit dates in retrieved memory before answering.
            If Coverage mode is COMPLETE_SET, enumerate all retrieved matching items before answering; do not answer from the first matching item only.
            If the user asks for an exact quote, exact wording, source, or when something was said, prefer the complete source text from Retrieved evidence; evidence quote fields are short excerpts and may be incomplete.
            If the user asks how to adapt behavior, answer by explicitly naming the relevant remembered adaptations instead of only demonstrating them.

            Namespace: benchmark:longmemeval:681a1674
            Context mode: FACTUAL
            Coverage mode: COMPLETE_SET
            Require evidence fallback: true

            none

            Retrieved action items:
            none

            Retrieved claims:
            - claim hot-path-dd128b4ddc97-claim-5 [ACTIVE] has_experience_with family=has_experience_with: The user re-watched Spider-Man: No Way Home before or on 2023-05-22.; scope=User movie viewing history and recommendation context; context="The user mentioned re-watching Spider-Man: No Way Home while asking for non-Marvel superhero movie recommendations."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:95fc0fe503a13270bec49cf5a516d21b quote="I also re-watched Spider-Man: No Way Home"
- claim hot-path-192d2df7b1b6-claim-4 [ACTIVE] has_goal family=has_goal: The user wanted to watch more Marvel movies and get recommendations for movies similar to Avengers: Endgame.; scope=User entertainment and movie recommendation context.; context="In a movie-recommendation conversation about Avengers: Endgame-like films."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 quote="I'm thinking of watching more Marvel movies and I was wondering if you could recommend some other movies similar to Avengers: Endgame."
- claim hot-path-192d2df7b1b6-claim-6 [ACTIVE] has_experience_with family=has_experience_with: The user had recently watched four Marvel movies as of 2023-05-20.; scope=User movie-watching history as of the 2023-05-20 conversation.; context="The user identified Doctor Strange as one of the four Marvel movies they watched recently."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 quote="it was one of the four Marvel movies I watched recently"
- claim hot-path-192d2df7b1b6-claim-9 [ACTIVE] has_experience_with family=has_experience_with: The user re-watched Avengers: Endgame on 2023-05-19.; scope=User movie-watching history.; context="The session date was 2023-05-20, and the user said they had just re-watched Avengers: Endgame yesterday."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 quote="I just re-watched Avengers: Endgame yesterday"
- claim hot-path-192d2df7b1b6-claim-7 [ACTIVE] prefers family=prefers: The user is more interested in non-Marvel movies similar to Avengers: Endgame than in additional Marvel recommendations.; scope=User movie recommendation preferences in the Avengers: Endgame-like movie domain.; context="The user shifted the recommendation request away from Marvel movies after noting they had already watched Doctor Strange."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 quote="I'm more interested in non-Marvel movies similar to Avengers: Endgame."
- claim hot-path-192d2df7b1b6-claim-10 [ACTIVE] avoids family=avoids: The user wanted movie recommendations that are not part of the Marvel Cinematic Universe.; scope=User movie recommendation exclusions for Avengers: Endgame-like films.; context="The user requested sci-fi or action movies with grandeur and epic battles outside the MCU."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 quote="not part of the Marvel Cinematic Universe"
- claim hot-path-192d2df7b1b6-claim-5 [ACTIVE] has_experience_with family=has_experience_with: The user has watched Doctor Strange.; scope=User movie-watching history.; context="The user said Doctor Strange was one of four Marvel movies they had watched recently."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 quote="I've actually watched Doctor Strange already"
- claim hot-path-dd128b4ddc97-claim-8 [ACTIVE] prefers family=prefers: The user is more interested in newer movie releases when seeking non-Marvel superhero recommendations.; scope=User movie recommendation preferences; context="After saying they had already seen The Dark Knight, the user asked for recent non-Marvel superhero movies from the past few years."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:95fc0fe503a13270bec49cf5a516d21b quote="I'm more interested in newer releases"
- claim hot-path-dd128b4ddc97-claim-11 [ACTIVE] has_experience_with family=has_experience_with: The user had recently been watching many movies with complex villains as of 2023-05-22.; scope=User recent movie viewing interests; context="The user gave the Joker in The Dark Knight as an example of the complex villains they had been watching lately."; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:95fc0fe503a13270bec49cf5a516d21b quote="I've been watching a lot of movies with complex villains lately"

Can you recommend some recent non-Marvel superhero movies from the past few years?"
- note hot-path-192d2df7b1b6-note-3 [CONTEXT/ACTIVE]: Watched-reference context for avoiding duplicate movie recommendations; In this session the user indicated they had already watched Doctor Strange, had re-watched Avengers: Endgame shortly before the conversation, and had already seen Pacific Rim: Uprising; future recommendations in this context should avoid treating those as new suggestions.; scope=User's watched-movie context from the 2023-05-20 recommendation session; evidence=DIRECT source=external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 quote="You mentioned Pacific Rim: Uprising, which I've already seen."

            Retrieved evidence:
            - source external:provided-text:5f03e2dea0389f1649a2ffe924847c88 [external_record ref=longmemeval:681a1674:session:1 observedAt=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z]: ...[matching excerpts]...
LongMemEval past chat session.
Session date: 2023/05/20 (Sat) 11:05
Transcript:
user: I'm thinking of watching more Marvel movies and I was wondering if you could recommend some other movies similar to Avengers: Endgame.
assistant: Avengers: Endgame is an epic conclusion to the Infinity Saga! If you're looking for more movies similar to it, I've got some recommendations that you might enjoy:

1. **The Justice League** (2017) - While not part of the Marvel Cinematic Universe (MCU), this DC superhero film brings together iconic characters like Batman, Wonder Woman, and Superman to fight against a powerful villain....
...4. **Guardians of the Galaxy Vol. 2** (2017) - Another MCU film, this sequel to the original Guardians of the Galaxy offers a similar tone, humor, and action-packed adventure as the team explores the mysteries of Peter Quill's past....
...7. **Doctor Strange** (2016) - This MCU film explores the mystical side of the Marvel universe, with a similar sense of visual spectacle, action, and mind-bending plot twists as Doctor Strange battles dark forces.
8. **The Avengers** (2012) - If you haven't seen it, the original Avengers film laid the groundwork for the MCU and features a similar sense of team-up action and humor as the heroes come together to save the world....
...These movies offer a mix of action, adventure, humor, and emotional depth that fans of Avengers: Endgame tend to enjoy. Let me know if you have any specific preferences (e.g., Marvel vs. DC, animated vs. live-action, etc.), and I can give you more tailored recommendations!
user: I've actually watched Doctor Strange already, it was one of the four Marvel movies I watched recently. I'm more interested in non-Marvel movies similar to Avengers: Endgame. Can you recommend some sci-fi or action movies that have a similar scale and scope?
assistant: If you're looking for non-Marvel movies similar to Avengers: Endgame in terms of scale and scope, here are some sci-fi and action recommendations:...
...These movies offer a mix of action, adventure, and sci-fi elements that fans of Avengers: Endgame tend to enjoy. Keep in mind that while they may not be exact duplicates, they share some similarities with the Marvel epic in terms of scale and scope.
user: Since I just re-watched Avengers: Endgame yesterday, I've been thinking about other movies that might have a similar sense of scale and action. Have you got any recommendations for sci-fi or action movies that are not part of the Marvel Cinematic Universe, but still offer a similar sense of grandeur and epic battles?
assistant: I've got some fantastic recommendations for you!

Here are some sci-fi and action movies outside the Marvel Cinematic Universe that offer a similar sense of grandeur and epic battles:...
...user: I'm interested in watching more sci-fi and action movies with a similar sense of scale and grandeur as Avengers: Endgame. You mentioned Pacific Rim: Uprising, which I've already seen. I'd like to explore more options. Can you recommend some other movies that might interest me?...
...user: I've already seen some of these movies, but I'm interested in exploring more options. You mentioned Edge of Tomorrow, which I think has a similar sense of urgency and action to Avengers: Endgame. Can you recommend more movies that have a similar blend of sci-fi and action elements?...
...user: I've been thinking about other movies that might have a similar sense of scale and action to Avengers: Endgame. Since I re-watched Avengers: Endgame, which is a Marvel movie, I've been exploring more sci-fi and action movies with a similar sense of grandeur and epic battles.
assistant: Avengers: Endgame is an epic conclusion to the Infinity Saga, and it's natural to crave more movies with a similar sense of scale and action. Since you've already explored some Marvel movies, let's venture into other sci-fi and action films that offer a similar sense of grandeur and epic battles:...
- source external:provided-text:95fc0fe503a13270bec49cf5a516d21b [external_record ref=longmemeval:681a1674:session:2 observedAt=1970-01-01T00:00:00Z]: ...[matching excerpts]...
LongMemEval past chat session.
Session date: 2023/05/22 (Mon) 18:03
Transcript:
user: I'm trying to find some new movies to watch. I've been into Marvel movies lately, I also re-watched Spider-Man: No Way Home, which is another Marvel movie. Can you recommend some other superhero films that aren't from the Marvel universe?
assistant: A Marvel fan, eh? Well, there are plenty of amazing superhero movies outside of the Marvel universe that you might enjoy. Here are some recommendations:

**DC Extended Universe (DCEU) Movies:**...
...**Other Superhero Movies:**...
...**Upcoming Non-Marvel Superhero Movies:**...
...user: I've already seen The Dark Knight, it's one of my favorite movies. I'm more interested in newer releases. Can you recommend some recent non-Marvel superhero movies from the past few years?
assistant: In that case, here are some recent non-Marvel superhero movies from the past few years that you might enjoy:

**DC Extended Universe (DCEU) Movies:**...
...**Other Superhero Movies:**...
...**Upcoming Non-Marvel Superhero Movies:**...
...Keep in mind that release dates may vary depending on your region and the current pandemic situation. I hope you find something that interests you!
user: I've heard good things about Shazam!, can you tell me more about it? Is it a light-hearted superhero film like Spider-Man: No Way Home?...
...**Tone:** The film has a playful, humorous tone, with a focus on Billy's fish-out-of-water experience as a teenager trapped in a grown-up body with superpowers. It's a coming-of-age story with plenty of humor, heart, and action. The movie doesn't take itself too seriously, and it's full of Easter eggs and references to classic superhero movies and TV shows....
...However, Shazam! has a more innocent and naive tone, which fits with the character's origin story and the film's nostalgic vibe. Spider-Man: No Way Home, on the other hand, deals with more mature themes and has a larger scope, given its connection to the Marvel Cinematic Universe....
...* A nostalgic feel, with nods to classic superhero movies and TV shows...
...user: I'm curious about the cast, especially Zachary Levi. Has he played any other notable roles before Shazam!?...
...3. **Thor: The Dark World** (2013) - Levi played the role of Fandral, a member of the Warriors Three, in this Marvel Cinematic Universe film....
...user: That's really interesting. I didn't know he was in Tangled. I've seen that movie with my family and really enjoyed it. I'll have to pay attention to his voice acting next time I watch it. Anyway, back to Shazam!, I'm curious about the movie's villain. Can you tell me more about Doctor Sivana and his motivations?...
...user: Now that I think about it, I've been watching a lot of movies with complex villains lately, like the Joker in The Dark Knight. It's interesting to see how different actors bring these characters to life. Anyway, back to Shazam!, I'm curious about the movie's themes. Can you tell me more about what the film is trying to say about family and identity?...

            Retrieved entities:
            - entity entity:<0> [CONCEPT]: Marvel Cinematic Universe; Concept named Marvel Cinematic Universe.
- entity entity:<1> [CONCEPT]: Newer movie releases; Concept named Newer movie releases.
- entity entity:<2> [CONCEPT]: Non-Marvel superhero movies; Concept named Non-Marvel superhero movies.
- entity entity:<3> [PRODUCT]: Spider-Man: No Way Home; Product named Spider-Man: No Way Home.
- entity entity:<4> [PRODUCT]: The Dark Knight; Product named The Dark Knight.
- entity entity:<5> [USER]: User; The user interacting with this agent.

            Retrieved episodes:
            none

hypothesis.description: Short answer that can be produced from the retrieved memory context.

reason.description: One short sentence explaining the judgement.

supported.description: Whether retrieved memory is sufficient to support the expected answer.

systemPrompts:
You are an objective evaluator for a long-term-memory benchmark.
Decide whether the retrieved memory context is sufficient to answer the question in the same core direction as the noisy expected-answer label.
Retrieved memory context is the only source of truth. The expected-answer label is a comparison hint, not evidence.
Mark supported=true when the context contains equivalent source-grounded facts, preferences, events, or rationale, even if wording differs.
For imported chat transcripts, source-grounded support may come from adjacent turns and the active topic, not only from one sentence that literally repeats the answer.
Accept a strong conversational entailment when the expected answer follows from the surrounding user/assistant turns and no other retrieved source points to a competing answer.
Details that appear only in the expected-answer label but not in retrieved memory are non-binding and must not be called central unless the retrieved context itself makes them necessary for answering the question.
The official expected answer can contain noisy illustrative examples or broad inferences not literally present in the source. Do not require every illustrative example when the memory supports the central answer.
For preference or personalization questions, supported=true when the retrieved memory contains the concrete user-specific consideration needed to personalize the answer in the same core direction, even if the expected answer lists additional absent examples.
Do not mark unsupported solely because the official answer names an extra participant, pet name, or causal detail that is absent from the retrieved source while the central remembered event, preference, count, or rationale is still supported.
Mark supported=false when the context is missing the central answer, contradicts it, leaves several plausible competing answers, or only supports a weaker unrelated subset.
